title: Does `--encrypt-layer` support multiple layer?
body:
I build the image, with the following dockerfile

```docker
FROM myBaseImage

RUN apt install xxxx
COPY project /home/project
ENV PATH /home/project/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /home/project/bin
```

I want to encrypt all the layers, except the base image. Is this possible? how?

comments.body:
I create a script to solve to problem
* use `skopeo inspect` & `yq` to get the layer information
* compare the layer information between base image and the image to encrypt, and get the layers need to encrypt
* use `--encrypt-layer` param
